title: Le Halua Le
subTitle: Sonali moves to the city to earn money and repay her debts to her landlord. She fakes a marriage with Suvojeet, a struggling artist, in order to get low-priced accommodation.

title: Autograph
subTitle: Samar, a deep-sea diver, revisits the memories of his past relationships. He cherishes the moments of joy and appreciates the contribution of all the people who are a part of his life.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: While Parvati attempts to convince Lord Shiva to protect the planet, Tarakasura seeks help from Brahma.

title: Ami Neta Hobo
subTitle: After several attempts, a young man gathers enough courage to fight for his rights and rises against a corrupt politician.

title: Aparajita
subTitle: Sagar and Mamta's marital bliss is dampened due to a misunderstanding. While pregnant with their child, she leaves the house and vows to raise a talented singer.

title: Kencho Khunrte Keute
subTitle: Gyanoda loses his son and daughter-in-law, leaving his granddaughter Parama as a spoilt child. To discipline her, he leaves a will which requires her to marry to gain full inheritance access.

title: I Love You
subTitle: A rich boy loves a poor village girl, but when his family insults her, he chooses to leave his wealthy life and move to her simple village to prove his love.

title: Aakrosh
subTitle: Two detectives investigate the disappearance of three medical students in a small village, but their search is hampered by corrupt local authorities.

title: Dada Thakur
subTitle: Gita plans to reunite with her long-estranged father, not knowing that he is waiting for her younger sister, Mita, to return. The two siblings then struggle to win back his trust.

title: Neel Akasher Chandni
subTitle: Neel Akasher Chandni

title: Neel Akasher Chandni
subTitle: Neel Akasher Chandni

title: Bhoomi - A Land
subTitle: When Binoy returns to his home town, he is shocked to realise that a lot has changed over time. Corrupt construction groups and the gangsters Nadu and Hiru have taken over his town.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: As the gods seek Parvati's blessings before their fight, Tarakasura tries to take advantage of Shiva's absence to cause chaos amongst them.

title: Chittagainga Powa Noakhailla Maiya
subTitle: Chittagainga Powa Noakhailla Maiya

title: Pratisodh
subTitle: A malicious leader often sends his men to loot the crops from the helpless peasantry on failure to repay the loan amount. However, a samaritan decides to even the odds.

title: Janmadata
subTitle: A pair of close friends turn into enemies. Their grandchildren resolve to bring their families back together.

title: Barood
subTitle: An upright police officer strives to wipe out rampant corruption. When the son of a rich businessman tries to manipulate the law, the policeman decides to take a stand against him.

title: Satrur Muqubila
subTitle: Awbhoy, a dedicated police officer, develops a deep romantic interest in a young woman attending a job interview while undergoing training.

title: Poran Jaye Jolia Re
subTitle: A young man, Rabin, meets three different women at different stages in his life. The relationship he shares with these women, though very different from each other, help him grow as a person.

title: Badsha the King
subTitle: Badsha, a young man, saves Titli, a wealthy heiress, on multiple occasions. However, things become complicated when the duo falls in love.

title: Badsha the King
subTitle: Badsha, a young man, saves Titli, a wealthy heiress, on multiple occasions. However, things become complicated when the duo falls in love.

title: Proloy
subTitle: In a rural town plagued by crimes against women and children, a teacher decides to organise an activist group to stand up against the injustice.

title: Shiv Shakti
subTitle: Tarakasura believes that Parvati will respond to the gods' pleas. He then decides to take advantage of the time during incarnation to kill her.

title: Tumi Sudhu Amar
subTitle: Piku and Priya secure a big deal with Singhray Industries in London. However, the company owner's infatuation with Priya threatens their relationship.

title: Behula Lakhinder
subTitle: An arrogant man who is against theism refuses to acknowledge a Goddess in her mortal avatar. Later, she teaches him a lesson to accept her divinity.

title: Surya
subTitle: Ashok, a businessman, provides shelter to Mahim Halden who kills and takes over his property. Soon, Ashok's son, Surya, sets out to avenge his father's death.

title: Josh
subTitle: Indra, a care-free college student, tries to save his best friend's sister, Anuradha, from a dangerous family dispute, but his efforts lead to unexpected and worsening complications.

title: Champion
subTitle: Jones, a talented and disciplined footballer, is judged by his peers for his financial status. However, when he finds out about his past, he faces a dilemma.

title: Minister Phatakesto
subTitle: Fatakeshto, an MLA turned home minister, vows to rescue the government from a massive financial loss while political thugs create several hurdles for him.

title: Prem Amar
subTitle: A young man falls in love with his new neighbour. However, his life takes a turn for the worse when he learns that she is betrothed to another man.
